context: Tests whether the agent rejects both vague reasons and stack-level suppressions in favor of resource-scoped suppressions with concrete, reviewable rationale.

checklist.name: Stack-level suppression rejected
checklist.description: The explanation (inline comment or note) identifies that addStackSuppressions is too broad and suppresses all resources in the stack

checklist.name: Vague reason rejected
checklist.description: The explanation identifies 'false positive' and 'not applicable' as inadequate reasons that hide real risk

checklist.name: Both suppressions use addResourceSuppressions
checklist.description: suppressions.ts uses NagSuppressions.addResourceSuppressions for both findings, scoped to logsBucket

checklist.name: S1 reason references ADR or compensating controls
checklist.description: The AwsSolutions-S1 suppression reason mentions ephemeral data, restricted access, CloudTrail audit, or ADR-017

checklist.name: S2 reason references SecureTransport enforcement
checklist.description: The AwsSolutions-S2 suppression reason explains that SSL is enforced via bucket policy / aws:SecureTransport condition
